tagline: Bringing perfect smiles closer to you.
address: 123 Health Street, Kalyani Nagar, Pune, India

seo.title: SmileCare Dental | Best Dentist in Pune
seo.description: Affordable and professional dental care in Pune. Book your appointment today with top specialists.

doctor.name: Dr. Amit Sharma
doctor.about: Dr. Amit Sharma is a renowned orthodontist in Pune with a passion for helping patients achieve their best smiles. With over 15 years of experience, he leads SmileCare Dental offering state-of-the-art dental treatments.

services.name: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Professional teeth whitening services to brighten your smile safely and quickly.

services.name: Root Canal
services.description: Painless root canal treatments using advanced endodontic technology.

services.name: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent replacement for missing teeth offering a natural look and feel.

services.name: Braces & Aligners
services.description: Correct misaligned teeth with traditional braces or invisible aligners.

testimonials.name: Neha Joshi
testimonials.review: Excellent clinic! Dr. Amit is very patient and explains the procedure clearly. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.review: Had a painless root canal here. The staff is polite and the clinic is very hygienic.

testimonials.name: Priya Singh
testimonials.review: Got my teeth whitened and the results are amazing! Thank you SmileCare Dental.
